# Compound Engineering Attribution

Selected workflow skills in `.agents/skills/ce-*` and `ce-*` agents in
`.agents/agents/compound-engineering` and `.claude/agents` were vendored from:

https://github.com/EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin

Source inspected on 2026-05-16 from `/tmp/compound-engineering-plugin`.

The upstream project is MIT licensed. The license text is included in
`LICENSE` in this directory.

Vendored skills:

- `ce-strategy`
- `ce-brainstorm`
- `ce-plan`
- `ce-work`
- `ce-debug`
- `ce-code-review`
- `ce-compound`

Vendored agents:

- `ce-*.agent.md` files from the upstream `agents/` directory

These files are committed so korealpha teammates can use the same workflow
instructions from the repository without requiring a global plugin install.
